hero.headline: Real Estate Sales with Verified Buyer Financing
hero.sub: Predictable closings through strategy, structure, and financing verification.
hero.body: You want to sell your property — securely, at the right price and without unpleasant surprises? We present you exclusively buyers with confirmed financing. No waiting. No backing out.
hero.photoAlt: Ali Artun – Your real estate advisor in Mosbach

stats.label: What sets us apart
stats.heading: Predictable closings, not random results
stats.sub: Our approach protects you from the most common pitfalls in property sales.
stats.item1_desc: We exclusively introduce buyers with a confirmed financing commitment from their bank.
stats.item2_desc: No anonymous call center. You always speak directly with Ali Artun — your dedicated contact.
stats.item3_desc: We know the real estate market in the Neckar-Odenwald district and the Mosbach region intimately.
stats.item4_desc: Pre-qualified buyers mean shorter negotiations and secure closings without surprises.

services.label: Our Services
services.heading: Everything from one source.
services.sub: We accompany you step by step — clearly, personally and without jargon.
services.s1_desc: We market your property professionally and discreetly — and ensure that only serious buyers with confirmed financing come to the table.
services.s2_desc: You receive an honest, market-appropriate assessment of your property's value — without pressure, without hidden costs.
services.s3_desc: Our unique selling point: We verify the financing ability of every prospective buyer before a viewing. Only those who can truly buy get an appointment.
services.s4_desc: From the first consultation to key handover, we are by your side. We handle all formalities and explain every step clearly.

process.label: How it works
process.heading: Your path to a successful sale.
process.sub: Four steps — clear, transparent and always by your side.
process.step1_desc: We take time for you — without rush, without pressure. You tell us about your property and your wishes. We listen and explain how we work.
process.step2_desc: We visit your property together and create an honest market price analysis. So you know from the start what your property is truly worth.
process.step3_desc: We actively search for suitable buyers — and verify their financing before proposing a viewing. Only serious prospects reach you.
process.step4_desc: We accompany you to the notary appointment, explain all documents and stand by you until key handover. Your sale is in good hands.

about.label: About Ali Artun
about.desc1: As the founder of Plan A Immobilien, I set myself one goal from the start: to design the property sale process the way I would want to experience it as a seller — honestly, personally and without unpleasant surprises.
about.desc2: My concept of verified buyer financing ensures that as a seller you only speak with prospects who can truly buy. This saves you time, stress and protects you from disappointments.
about.point2: Member of IVD (Real Estate Association Germany)
about.photoAlt: Ali Artun – Your real estate advisor in Mosbach

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.heading: What our clients say
testimonials.sub: Real experiences matter more than empty promises. Something is taking shape here.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Your questions, our answers
faq.sub: Everything important about property sales — explained clearly and simply.
faq.q1: How does a property sale with Plan A Immobilien work?
faq.a1: We start with a free consultation where we get to know your property and your goals. Then we create a market value assessment, develop a marketing strategy and accompany you personally through to the notarial closing.
faq.q2: What does it cost to use an agent?
faq.a2: The agent commission in property sales is typically split between buyer and seller. In Baden-Württemberg, 3.57% (incl. VAT) per side is standard. We discuss all terms transparently in the initial consultation.
faq.q3: What does verified buyer financing mean?
faq.a3: Before we introduce a buyer to your property, we verify their financing ability. Only buyers with a confirmed financing commitment from their bank are introduced — this prevents reversals and saves you time.
faq.q4: How is the value of my property determined?
faq.a4: We analyze comparable sales in your area, considering location, condition, features and current market trends. The result is a realistic market price that neither under- nor overvalues your property.
faq.q5: How long does a property sale take on average?
faq.a5: With the right strategy and pre-qualified buyers, a sale in 4–12 weeks is realistic. The exact duration depends on property, location and price segment. Our financing verification significantly reduces unnecessary delays.
faq.q6: Do I need to be present at viewings?
faq.a6: No, that is not required. We conduct viewings professionally and give you feedback afterwards. If you would like to be present, we will naturally coordinate the appointments with you.
faq.q7: What is the difference between asking price and sale price?
faq.a7: The asking price is the price at which we list the property on the market. The sale price is the actually achieved price after negotiation. Realistic pricing from the start prevents long marketing times and price reductions.
faq.q8: Can you also help buyers with financing?
faq.a8: Yes. As a financing broker we help prospective buyers find the right bank financing. This significantly accelerates the purchasing process for you as a seller and ensures secure closings.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Talk to us.
contact.sub: Want to have your property valued or have questions about selling? We are here for you — personally, non-bindingly and free of charge.
contact.formSub: We will contact you personally — within 24 hours on weekdays.
contact.messagePH: Do you have further information or questions?

footer.brand: Your partner for secure property sales in the Neckar-Odenwald district. Personal. Discreet. Reliable.

auszeichnungen.label: Qualifications
auszeichnungen.heading: Certified & licensed
auszeichnungen.sub: Your property is in professional hands – with all necessary approvals and qualifications.
auszeichnungen.z1_desc: State-licensed real estate agent pursuant to § 34c Trade Regulations – required for professional property brokerage in Germany.
auszeichnungen.z2_desc: IHK-certified training and expertise in real estate and agency law, valuation and sales processes.
auszeichnungen.z3_desc: Member of the IVD real estate association – the leading professional association for real estate professions with a binding code of ethics.
auszeichnungen.z4_desc: All customer data is processed and stored in accordance with GDPR. Transparent handling of your information.

finanzierung.heroSub: Connected with over 300 banks nationwide – independent, transparent and on your side
finanzierung.tab1Desc: Financing for existing properties, old buildings and renovation projects. We find the right loan for older buildings with special charm. Individual solutions for listed buildings, energy-efficient renovation and modernisation.
finanzierung.tab2Desc: From land purchase to key handover – we accompany your new build financing with the best terms. Phased payments according to construction progress, KfW subsidies and special repayment options included.
finanzierung.tab3Desc: Special financing solutions for property developers and project developers. We structure your financing so your project is optimally secured from planning to sale.
finanzierung.tab4Desc: Building society contracts as a solid foundation for your property financing. Low loan interest rates, government subsidies and predictable instalments – perfect for long-term savings.
finanzierung.tab5Desc: Flexible personal loans for renovation, modernisation or equity top-up. Fast processing, fair terms and independent comparison from over 300 bank partners.
finanzierung.highlightSub: We find the best loan for you – from a network of over 300 partner banks.
finanzierung.highlightBadge: Free credit comparison – independent and transparent
finanzierung.f1Desc: We compare for you – not tied to one bank. That means true independence and the best terms.
finanzierung.f2Desc: Through our network you receive offers that you as an individual could not get otherwise.
finanzierung.f3Desc: Typical financing commitment within 24–48 hours. We ensure no purchase falls through.
finanzierung.f4Desc: Ali Artun personally guides you through the entire financing process – from application to completion.
finanzierung.s1Desc: We get to know your situation and wishes. What would you like to buy? What is your financial starting point?
finanzierung.s2Desc: We obtain offers from our network of 300+ banks and financing partners.
finanzierung.s3Desc: You receive the best financing – clearly explained, transparently documented, securely processed.
finanzierung.ctaSub: Non-binding initial consultation – we check your options and find the best offer.

partnerWarum.heroSub: As a partner at Plan A Real Estate you bring in properties or contacts. The rest – valuation, marketing, financing, processing – is handled by Ali Artun.
partnerWarum.quote: I am not looking for employees. I am looking for partners.
partnerWarum.quoteText1: When I founded Plan A Real Estate, my goal was clear: to build a system that works for both sides. For sellers who want a secure closing – and for people who want to benefit from real estate without having to learn everything from scratch.
partnerWarum.quoteText2: My advantage as a partner: I combine estate agency and financing in one. Buyers come with confirmed financing – the closing is predictable.
partnerWarum.quoteText3: If you know someone who wants to sell – that is enough. I handle the rest.
partnerWarum.modelSub: A clear division of tasks that works for everyone.
partnerWarum.v1Desc: For a property value of €300,000, there is around €10,000 in commission – you receive a significant share. And that per closing.
partnerWarum.v2Desc: Ali trains you in valuation, marketing, financing and sales conversations. No expensive course, no hidden costs.
partnerWarum.v3Desc: Keep your job. Start part-time and build up step by step.
partnerWarum.v4Desc: No investment required. You pay nothing. You bring properties or contacts – we handle the rest.
partnerWarum.v5Desc: Buyers rarely fall through – because financing commitments are obtained early.
partnerWarum.v6Desc: Ali is personally by your side. No anonymous company – one direct contact person.
partnerWarum.d1Desc: Before a prospect views a property, their financing ability is verified. This prevents failed closings.
partnerWarum.d2Desc: Every property is strategically positioned – with market analysis, professional exposé and targeted marketing.
partnerWarum.d3Desc: Through verified buyers and a structured process, the path to the notary appointment is reliable.
partnerWarum.q1: Do I need experience in real estate?
partnerWarum.a1: No. Ali trains you from the ground up. Prior knowledge is helpful but not required. What matters more is your motivation and network.
partnerWarum.a2: We clarify the exact terms in a personal meeting. As a guideline: for a €300,000 property, four-figure commissions are realistic.
partnerWarum.q3: Can I do this alongside my job?
partnerWarum.a3: Yes. Many partners start part-time. There is no minimum number of closings. You set the pace.
partnerWarum.q4: What happens if a closing does not happen?
partnerWarum.a4: You take no financial risk. Commission is only paid on successful closing.
partnerWarum.q5: How large does my network need to be?
partnerWarum.a5: Even a single property is enough to get started.
partnerWarum.ctaSub: Fill out the short application form – Ali Artun will get back to you personally.

aufbereitung.heroSub: Strategically and only when it pays off – for the best possible selling price.
aufbereitung.s1_desc: Professional cleaning for a fresh first impression. Moss, dirt and weathering are removed.
aufbereitung.s2_desc: Facade cleaning and treatment for optimal exterior impact – first impressions count.
aufbereitung.s3_desc: Driveway and paths professionally cleaned – well-maintained exterior areas significantly enhance the overall impression.
aufbereitung.s4_desc: A well-maintained garden significantly increases the perceived value. Trimming, care, design.
aufbereitung.s5_desc: Fresh walls make rooms brighter and more attractive. Small effort – big impact.
aufbereitung.s6_desc: The first online impression is decisive – we show your property at its best.
aufbereitung.resultsSub: Drag the slider to see the difference
aufbereitung.ex1_before: Weathered, dirty exterior facade with deposits
aufbereitung.ex1_after: Freshly cleaned and prepared facade – like new
aufbereitung.ex2_before: Overgrown, neglected garden with unkempt lawn
aufbereitung.ex2_after: Well-kept garden with freshly mown lawn and trimmed shrubbery
aufbereitung.ex3_before: Outdated, dark walls with peeling paint
aufbereitung.ex3_after: Bright, freshly painted walls in modern white
aufbereitung.hinweisText: Not every property benefits from preparation. We advise you honestly and without obligation whether preparation makes sense for your property and which measures bring the greatest added value.
aufbereitung.ctaTitle: Ready for the best possible selling price?
aufbereitung.ctaSub: Let us together check what makes sense for your property.
